name: back
description: This project was bootstrapped with Fastify-CLI.

scripts.predev: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const required = ['S3_ENDPOINT', 'S3_REGION', 'S3_ACCESS_KEY', 'S3_SECRET_KEY', 'S3_BUCKET', 'DATABASE_URI']; const missing = required.filter(v => !process.env[v]); if (missing.length) { console.error('Missing env vars:', missing); process.exit(1); }"
